code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
mut result = ""
mut token = ""
mut first = true
let n = string.len(input)
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let b_opt = string.byte_at(input, i)
  match b_opt
  when Some(b)
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if not string.is_empty(token)
        match string.parse_int(token)
        when Some(v)
          let doubled = v * 2
          if first
            result = "#{doubled}"
            first = false
          else
            result = "#{result} #{doubled}"
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        token = ""
      end
    else
      token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if not string.is_empty(token)
  match string.parse_int(token)
  when Some(v)
    let doubled = v * 2
    if first
      result = "#{doubled}"
    else
      result = "#{result} #{doubled}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
end

println(result)
